name: Tollhouse Pie
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup (1 1/2 sticks) butter, melted and cooled to room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until foamy.
2. Add flour and sugars; beat until well blended.
3. Blend in melted butter, milk, and vanilla.
4. Stir in morsels and nuts.
5. Pour into pie shell.
6. Bake at 325°F for one hour.
7. Serve warm with whipped cream or ice cream.
Recipe may be doubled.
